name: Diet Rite Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Diet Rite soda or Club soda (at room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients into the bread machine pan.
2. Select white bread setting on the bread machine.
3. Push start to begin baking.
Note: This recipe is designed for a bread machine and does not include additional instructions beyond those provided in the original text.
